name: Hnefatafl (Copenhagen)
author: AGP (Copenhagen Hnefatafl ruleset)
description: Hnefatafl on an 11x11 board with the modern Copenhagen ruleset. Asymmetric siege: a King on the central throne with 12 defenders in a diamond, against 24 attackers in four T-shaped groups of 6 at the edge midpoints (attackers move first). All pieces move like a rook. Soldiers are captured by custodial flanking; the empty throne and the four corners are hostile squares. The King is captured by surrounding him on all four sides (throne + 3 attackers when he stands beside the throne). The King wins by escaping to any corner; the attackers win by capturing the King.
